notes.f1: Marriage date (16 Nov 1828) and place (Bristol, England) correctly recovered from FamilySearch collection 1473015. Specific parish name (St. James) not named in tree, but Bristol is correct.
notes.f2: Maiden name Martin established from marriage record (a_002) and recorded as alternate name N1 in tree. GRO birth-index corroboration (Martha/Robert birth certificates) not found, but maiden name itself is present.
notes.f3: Agent found a different Elizabeth Martin (26 May 1811, Bristol, parents James & Ann Martin) instead of the expected Betty Martin (1 Nov 1812, Bitton, parents Thomas & Sophia Martin). The expected record is indexed under the nickname 'Betty' on FamilySearch, which the agent did not search for.
